title: Legal Secretaries and Administrative Assistants
description: Perform secretarial duties using legal terminology, procedures, and documents. Prepare legal papers and correspondence, such as summonses, complaints, motions, and subpoenas. May also assist with legal research.

tasks.text: Organize and maintain law libraries, documents, and case files.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mail, fax, or arrange for delivery of legal correspondence to clients, witnesses, and court officials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and distribute invoices to bill clients or pay account expenses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare, proofread, or process legal documents, such as summonses, subpoenas, complaints, appeals, motions, or pretrial agreements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make photocopies of correspondence, documents, and other printed matter.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist attorneys in collecting information such as employment, medical, and other records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Complete various forms, such as accident reports, trial and courtroom requests, and applications for clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Submit articles and information from searches to attorneys for review and approval for use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend legal meetings, such as client interviews, hearings, or depositions, and take notes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review legal publications and perform database searches to identify laws and court decisions relevant to pending cases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
